name: Poppy Seed Kolache
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients and lemon peel; cut in the butter until mixture is crumbly.
2. Combine the egg, lemon juice, and water to add to the flour mixture.
3. Knead lightly into a ball; divide into 8 parts.
4. Roll out each part on a floured board until it is 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut into 4-inch squares.
6. Spoon about 1 teaspoon Poppy Seed Filling into the center of each square.
7. Bring two ends together to form a cylinder.
8. Pinch together to seal.
9. Place on a greased baking sheet and brush with milk.
10. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
FILLING:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan; cook over low heat until thick, stirring often.
2. Cool and it's ready to use.
Note: Any cooked fruit or jam may be used instead of Poppy Seed Filling.
